items.summary: ApodexAI/AgentHarness: evaluation harness with smoke and full benchmark runs for public deep-research benchmarks
items.relevance_reason: Supports local replay validation of proposal interpretation without remote execution.

items.summary: samarailly51-pixel/opencode-harness: clean-room coding-agent harness with traces, eval reports, permission policy, and failure taxonomy
items.relevance_reason: Supports structured local reports that expose routing decisions and validation metadata.

items.summary: omnigent-ai/omnigent: provider and runner coordination evidence for detecting missing model configuration early
items.relevance_reason: Useful as a safe local candidate when covered by token-safe preflight tests.
Boundary evidence only; offensive or unauthorized-access behavior remains review-only.
Weak extra evidence that should be omitted under context pressure.

raw_response.run_interpretation: The safe reusable lesson is to harden local replay validation for proposal interpretation, routing, and validation metadata.

self_model_reading.reason: Current preference already favors rollback-backed local validation over report-only work.

proposals.summary: Add frozen local harness validation for proposal interpretation, routing decisions, and validation-gate metadata.
proposals.validation_task: Create focused local tests that replay frozen evidence packages and verify schema validity, evidence_ref restrictions, action_lane assignment, validation-gate metadata, and safety-boundary classification.
proposals.rationale: The public harnesses emphasize reproducible benchmark or eval reports, traces, and failure taxonomies; those patterns map to local replay tests.
proposals.uncertainty: The low-confidence extra item is truncated, so this does not claim complete coverage of every public harness feature.
proposals.self_effect: Improves future trend intelligence by making interpretation and controller metadata drift locally visible.

proposals.summary: Tighten provider/config/token preflight checks so missing model configuration is caught before runner execution.
proposals.validation_task: Add unit tests for missing provider, missing token, malformed provider config, and valid local stub configuration; verify no token values are logged or exposed.
proposals.rationale: The provider coordination evidence supports local preflight validation when it remains token-safe and unit covered.
proposals.uncertainty: The low-confidence extra item is truncated, and the upstream implementation was not copied.
proposals.self_effect: Would improve startup health and runner failure reporting.

proposals.summary: Keep offensive or abuse-enabling benchmark behavior review-only while allowing benign local fixtures.
proposals.validation_task: Keep offensive or abuse-enabling behavior review-only; do not implement attack, exploit, malware, phishing, exfiltration, or unauthorized-access behavior.
proposals.rationale: The selected security-adjacent harness evidence crosses the offensive-behavior boundary and should only inform review metadata.
proposals.uncertainty: The low-confidence extra item is truncated, and no offensive benchmark behavior is implemented locally.
proposals.self_effect: Preserves the safety boundary while still testing that the controller routes such proposals to review.
